titleZh: 奶牛场智慧化解决方案：从牛舍设计到精准饲喂与健康管理
summaryZh: 本文介绍了Lely公司针对奶牛场的一系列智慧化解决方案，涵盖牛舍优化设计、自动挤奶系统、精准饲喂（Cosmix）、智能放牧（Grazeway）、奶牛舒适度提升（Luna牛体刷）、蹄部护理（Lely Meteor蹄浴）以及牛奶冷却罐等。这些方案通过物联网、自动化和机器人技术，实现个体化奶牛管理，提升健康水平、产奶量和运营效率，同时降低劳动强度和成本，是智慧畜牧在奶牛养殖中的典型应用。
featuredReason: 本文系统展示了奶牛养殖中从环境控制、精准饲喂到健康管理的全链条智慧化方案，对于正在推进牧场数字化、自动化升级的从业者具有直接参考价值。
contentFull: Solutions overviewSolutionsBarnExploreHousing and caringOptimal barn design for optimal cow healthProper individual care of cows enhances the overall performance of the herd. An optimal barn design that focuses on the cows creates an animal-friendly environment, promoting cow health and well-being. Such an environment prevents health issues and is pleasant to work in, all while minimizing your workload. Efficient work practices allow you to devote full attention to cow care in a pleasant and animal-friendly setting. This improves cow health, leads to better yields, and reduces costs, resulting in an optimal barn for the well-being of both the animals and the caretaker.For efficient grazing Grazeway With the right strategy, grazing can be perfectly combined with automatic milking. The Grazeway selection box is an essential tool for this. Cows choose for themselves whether and when they want to go out to pasture. The Grazeway then determines whether or not they can, using the Tags cow-recognition system. Concentrates according to requirementsCosmix The Cosmix, in conjunction with the Astronaut and the Lely Tags cow-recognition, enhances rumen health and milk yield by providing precise concentrate feeding according to each cow’s requirements. This system ensures efficient feeding, reducing wastage and preventing mould or lumps. Horizon management system offers detailed insights into individual cow concentrate intake and milking data. Developed for automatic milkingCooling tank for Lely Astronaut Round-the-clock safeguarding of milk quality and maximum hygiene: that is what the Cooling tank for Lely Astronaut has to offer. Cooling starts with the first drop of milk and is adjusted based on the milk volume in the tank. The tank seamlessly works in tandem with the Lely Astronaut, our automatic milking system. For optimal cow comfortLuna The Luna cow brush is designed to pamper and care for your cows. The Luna brushes the skin and stimulates blood circulation. This leads not only to a more relaxed cow but also a calmer herd. Brushing not only improves blood circulation but also cleans dust and other dirt from the skin. This reduces itchy skin. Brushing is relaxing for the cows and they will happily be brushed several times a day. Read more about LunaEfficient hoof careHoof bath for Lely MeteorThe Hoof bath for Lely Meteor offers regular care for hooves. Safe to use: with a simple push of a button, the foot bath fills up with water and a hoof care product. The cows walk through the hoof bath, thereby obtaining the efficient hoof care they need. Easy to do after milking in the milking robot or in another set spot in the barn. The preventive action with the special developed Lely Meteor Hoof Bath Liquid for application in the hoof bath is for optimal care of the hooves. This product is free from formalin, copper sulfates, QACs and antibiotics. The system is self-cleaning, ensuring that any contamination does not affect the hoof health of the herd.24/7 insights about your cowsLely tags A true insight into your cows’ health prevents diseases and loss of production. Lely tags cow-recognition measures the most vital data per cow every two hours. There are tags for various aspects, such as identification, checking whether the cow is in heat and rumination. ResourcesDownload the brochureBrochureHoofbath for Lely MeteorDownload the Hoofbath for Lely Meteor brochureDownloadBrochureLunaDownload the Luna brochureDownloadWhy our solutions?Our solutions contribute to more than just high-quality milk. They offer freedom of choice and flexibility and contribute to the well-being of you and your cows. From machines to software and new innovations, we have many options. Contact one of our Lely Centers for advice.Get free advice
translationZh:
**解决方案概览**

**牛舍**

**探索牛舍**

**饲养与护理**

**优化牛舍设计，保障奶牛健康**

对奶牛进行恰当的个体护理可提升整个牛群的性能。以奶牛为核心的优化牛舍设计能够营造动物友好的环境，促进奶牛健康与福祉。这样的环境可预防健康问题，同时让工作环境舒适宜人，并最大限度减少工作量。高效的工作方式使您能够在愉快且动物友好的环境中全身心投入奶牛护理。这能改善奶牛健康，带来更高产量，降低成本，最终实现既有利于动物也有利于饲养员的理想牛舍。

**高效放牧**

**Grazeway**

采用正确的策略，放牧可以与自动挤奶完美结合。Grazeway选择箱是实现这一目标的关键工具。奶牛可以自行决定是否以及何时外出放牧。Grazeway随后利用Tags奶牛识别系统判断它们是否可以出去。

**按需精准饲喂**

**Cosmix**

Cosmix与Astronaut挤奶机器人及Lely Tags奶牛识别系统配合使用，通过根据每头奶牛的需求提供精准的精料饲喂，改善瘤胃健康并提高产奶量。该系统确保高效饲喂，减少浪费，并防止饲料结块或发霉。Horizon管理系统提供关于每头奶牛精料采食量和挤奶数据的详细洞察。专为自动挤奶系统开发。

**Lely Astronaut冷却罐**

全天候保障牛奶质量和最高卫生标准：这就是Lely Astronaut冷却罐所提供的功能。冷却从第一滴牛奶开始，并根据罐内牛奶量进行调整。该罐与我们的自动挤奶系统Lely Astronaut无缝协作。

**优化奶牛舒适度**

**Luna**

Luna牛体刷旨在呵护和照料您的奶牛。Luna刷拭皮肤并促进血液循环。这不仅能让奶牛更放松，还能使整个牛群更平静。刷拭不仅能改善血液循环，还能清除皮肤上的灰尘和其他污垢，减少皮肤瘙痒。刷拭对奶牛来说是一种放松，它们会乐于每天多次接受刷拭。

**了解更多关于Luna的信息**

**高效蹄部护理**

**Lely Meteor蹄浴**

Lely Meteor蹄浴提供定期的蹄部护理。使用安全：只需按一下按钮，蹄浴盆就会充满水和蹄部护理产品。奶牛走过蹄浴盆，从而获得所需的高效蹄部护理。可在挤奶机器人挤奶后或牛舍内的其他指定位置轻松进行。使用专门开发的Lely Meteor蹄浴液进行预防性处理，可实现最佳蹄部护理。该产品不含福尔马林、硫酸铜、季铵化合物和抗生素。系统具有自清洁功能，确保任何污染都不会影响牛群的蹄部健康。

**全天候洞察**
